hypothesis: Add item_id × store_id smoothed target encoding broken down by weekday: for each (item_id, store_id, wday) triple compute smoothed mean sales using training data only. This captures item-store-weekday demand patterns more precisely than the existing per-item and per-store encodings, which average across all weekdays. The interaction is key because different stores have different weekly patterns for the same item (e.g., weekend vs weekday peaks). All other settings unchanged from exp_0012 (best so far at 0.94640).
